title: Media elements should include captions
description: Media elements (video and audio) should include captions for accessibility compliance. Captions provide text versions of audio content, making media accessible to individuals who are deaf or hard of hearing. They are essential for WCAG accessibility compliance and improve user experience for non-native speakers and situations where audio cannot be heard.
recommendation: Add track elements with captions/subtitles to video and audio elements for accessibility compliance.

checks.message: Video/audio HTML elements should include track elements for captions
Dynamically created media elements should include caption tracks
